<path d="M256 16l56 120 128-24-64 112 104 80-128 40 40 128-112-72-112 72 40-128-128-40 104-80-64-112 128 24z" fill="#FFD400" stroke="#000" stroke-width="32" stroke**Designing SVG Icon Now**
My focus is now on the actual SVG code. I've switched to a starburst-style design, integrating a lightning bolt within. This design aligns with the "Super Smash KC" theme, offering a visual representation of both the theme and the energy of a lightning strike. I've refined the SVG, and believe the final design looks great. Now, I must put this SVG into the `src/app/icon.svg` path.
-linejoin="round"/>
